title: Admin double-auth (ID/password + Internet Identity), remove Quick Access cards, clean homepage

requirements.text: Remove the Quick Access cards (User Panel / Admin Panel) from the homepage (HomePage.tsx). The homepage should only show the hero section, tournaments, and other existing public content — no shortcut navigation cards to panels.

quotes: Homepage se Quick Access (User Panel / Admin Panel) cards bilkul hata dene hain

acceptanceCriteria: No 'User Panel' or 'Admin Panel' quick access cards are visible on the homepage
Hero section, featured tournaments, and CTA buttons remain intact
No broken layout after card removal

requirements.text: The main homepage (/) must be the user-facing page where players can browse tournaments and access register/login. This is already the primary route but ensure no admin-facing elements appear here.

quotes: User wali website → main homepage ho jahan users tournaments dekhe, register/login karein

acceptanceCriteria: Homepage shows tournament listings or a CTA to browse tournaments
Register and Login links/buttons are accessible from the homepage
No admin controls or admin shortcuts are present on the homepage

requirements.text: Implement a two-step admin authentication flow for /admin. Step 1: Show a login form requiring Username = 'Empire Esports' and Password = 'Shivam803119&'. Only on successful credential match should the user proceed to Step 2. Step 2: Require Internet Identity login. The Internet Identity principal that first completes admin setup is stored as the sole authorized admin principal (persisted in backend stable storage). On subsequent logins, after credential check passes, the user must log in with Internet Identity and their principal must match the stored admin principal. If no admin principal is registered yet, the current Internet Identity login registers it. Only after both steps pass should the admin dashboard be accessible.

quotes: Id Password se protect karein — admin ke liye ek secret Id- Empire Esports   password- Shivam803119&

Internet Identity se — loging karne ka option de do taki me baar baar id password change kar sakun lekin ek chij or ek hi log ragisterd kar sakta h google se chalega multiple device me admin ka panle lekin Internet Identity ek hi hoga bo mera hoga
agar koi user admin me loging karna chahega to usko pahle mera ye main id dalna padega ek baar

acceptanceCriteria: Visiting /admin shows a credential form (username + password) before anything else
Wrong credentials block access and show an error message
After correct credentials, user is prompted to login with Internet Identity
The first Internet Identity principal to complete admin login is saved as the sole admin principal in backend stable storage
Subsequent admin logins require the same Internet Identity principal; any other principal is rejected with an error
A successfully authenticated admin can access the full admin dashboard
Admin session state is persisted in localStorage so the user stays logged in across page refreshes
Admin can logout, which clears both credential and Internet Identity session state
Multiple devices can access admin panel using the same Internet Identity principal

requirements.text: Add backend Motoko functions to store and retrieve the registered admin Internet Identity principal. Include: `registerAdminPrincipal(p: Principal): async Bool` — stores the principal only if none is registered yet (returns true on success, false if already set); `getAdminPrincipal(): async ?Principal` — returns the stored admin principal; `isAdminPrincipal(p: Principal): async Bool` — checks if the given principal matches the stored admin principal. Use stable storage for the admin principal.

quotes: ek hi log ragisterd kar sakta h
Internet Identity ek hi hoga bo mera hoga

acceptanceCriteria: registerAdminPrincipal stores a principal only once; subsequent calls return false
getAdminPrincipal returns null if not set, or the stored principal
isAdminPrincipal correctly validates against stored principal
Admin principal persists across canister upgrades via stable storage

requirements.text: Update AdminAuthContext to implement the two-step flow: Step 1 validates hardcoded credentials (Username: 'Empire Esports', Password: 'Shivam803119&'). Step 2 triggers Internet Identity login via useInternetIdentity and calls the backend to register or verify the admin principal. Expose state for: credentialsVerified, identityVerified, isAdminAuthenticated (both steps complete). Persist both flags in localStorage. On logout, clear both flags and Internet Identity session.

quotes: Internet Identity se — loging karne ka option de do

acceptanceCriteria: AdminAuthContext exposes credentialsVerified and isAdminAuthenticated flags
isAdminAuthenticated is true only when both credential and Internet Identity steps succeed
Logout clears all admin session state from localStorage
Context uses useInternetIdentity hook for II integration

requirements.text: Update AdminLoginPage to render a two-step UI. Step 1: Username/Password form. On success, advance to Step 2. Step 2: Show an 'Authenticate with Internet Identity' button. Display clear error messages if credentials are wrong or if the Internet Identity principal does not match the registered admin. Show a loading state during Internet Identity authentication.

quotes: Id Password se protect karein — admin ke liye ek secret Id- Empire Esports   password- Shivam803119&
Internet Identity se — loging karne ka option de do

acceptanceCriteria: Step 1 shows username and password fields with a submit button
Wrong credentials show an error and do not advance to Step 2
Step 2 shows an 'Login with Internet Identity' button
If the Internet Identity principal is rejected, an error message is shown
On full success, user is redirected to /admin dashboard
Loading spinner shown during Internet Identity authentication

requirements.text: Remove the admin shield/link from the Header component so regular users cannot see or navigate to the admin panel from the main site header.

quotes: Admin panel → ek alag /admin URL ho jo sirf admin use kare (directly URL type karke jaaye)

acceptanceCriteria: No admin icon, link, or shortcut appears in the public site header
Admin panel is only accessible by directly typing /admin in the URL bar

constraints: Hardcoded admin credentials must be: Username = 'Empire Esports', Password = 'Shivam803119&'
Only one Internet Identity principal can be registered as admin — enforced in backend stable storage
Do not modify immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
Admin principal must survive canister upgrades (use stable storage in Motoko)
nonGoals: Email-based admin recovery or password reset
Changing the existing player authentication flow
Any changes to tournament CRUD logic
